title: Action Item Extractor - Tasks
description: Action items extracted from meeting transcripts, emails, or documents by the Action Item Extractor plugin. Created on first run via lazy DB creation.

Title.description: Verb-first action description (max 80 chars). Examples: 'Review project timeline', 'Send invoice to client', 'Schedule team sync'.

Description.description: Full context of what needs to be done, including relevant details from the source document.

Owner.description: Who should complete this task. Inferred from content using owner inference rules: explicit @mention > named delegation > team reference > default to user.

Deadline.description: ISO date deadline or empty. Parsed from explicit dates, relative references ('by Friday'), and urgency language ('ASAP' = today).

Priority.description: Priority score 1-5. 5 = critical/urgent, 1 = low/backlog. Inferred from urgency language, deadline proximity, and context.

Source Type.description: Type of document the action item was extracted from.

Source Title.description: Title or subject of the source document, email, or meeting.

Extracted At.description: Timestamp when the action item was extracted.

notes: The plugin searches for this database by name before creating it (lazy creation). Duplicate detection uses verb+noun matching within a 14-day window to prevent re-extraction of the same action items.
